testcase.name: test_revoke_stamp_requires_reason

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 403 assert 403 in [400, 422] + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ledger.py:233: in test_revoke_stamp_requires_reason assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected 400/422, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400/422, got 403 E assert 403 in [400, 422] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_revoke_stamp_not_found
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ledger.py:242: in test_revoke_stamp_not_found assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 403 E assert 403 == 404 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_csv_export_returns_csv
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ledger.py:323: in test_csv_export_returns_csv assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 404 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_csv_export_with_filters
testcase.failure: tests/test_stamp_ledger.py:350: in test_csv_export_with_filters assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
